channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: This DIY retro-style mini-TV looks like it's from the Simpsons, and plays classic NES games and movies — and yes please, I want one
item.description: This excellent little electronics project gives you a 2.8-inch retro TV that's good for gaming and videos.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Sunday, May 24 (game #1581)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Sunday, May 24 (game #1078)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Sunday, May 24 (game #812)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: Record Club is trying to be Letterboxd for music nerds
item.description: There isn't really a solid equivalent to Goodreads or Letterboxd for music lovers, but Record Club is aiming to change that. Yes, we have Rate Your Music, but its interface is crowded, and it feels more geared towards longer-form reviews than cataloging your listening habits and connecting with other fans. Record Club is clean and […]

item.title: 'We never actually planned to start a company' — This 'accidental' spin-off from Germany revolutionizing 6G and space tech with microscopic filters that's barely thicker than a virus
item.description: Lepto developed microscopic terahertz filters supporting satellite communications, 6G research, medical imaging, and experimental quantum computing applications worldwide.

item.title: I won't shut up about the brilliance of this SteelSeries analog keyboard — in all my years of gaming, it's still the best I've ever used
item.description: Don't miss this great Memorial Day sale on the SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Gen 3 at Amazon right now.
